subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-09-27 in Glenwood Springs
subcodes.first_line: To turn to the Covenant is to obey the Blessed Beauty which is a cause of gathering together the people of Baha.
subcodes.first_line_orig: توجه بمیثاق اطاعت جمال مبارکست و سبب جمع شمل اهل بها واضح بگویم
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
